themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 6 verses. Commentary leans on "God commands: 'That ye may remember, and do all my commandments, and be holy unto your God.'...". Word-study detail reinforces "מִצְוָת֖וֹ: his commandment - a command, whether human or divine (collectively, the law)".

themes.label: Presence

Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "In ancient Near Eastern cultures, foreigners were typically excluded from cultic activities o...". Word-study detail reinforces "בְּתֽוֹכְכֶם֙: with you or whosoever be among - a bisection, i.e., (by implication) the center".
